author: Zhaoyan Sun, Shan Zhong, Daizhou Wen, Jiaxing Han et al.

readme.entry: - **[AgenticDataBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Data Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.01647)** — Zhaoyan Sun, Shan Zhong, Daizhou Wen, Jiaxing Han et al. — <https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.01647> · *paper/benchmark* — Comprehensive benchmark for data agents with realistic multi-domain data-science tasks, fine-grained labels, and an open testbed. 🆕

factuality.reason: structured evidence plus fetched source snapshot

quality.reason: concrete eval artifacts or methodology signals present

recency.reason: evidence indicates 2025-2026 or actively updated source

section: 9 · Agent-specific evaluation (trajectories, tool use, multi-turn, world state, multi-agent, localization)
title: AgenticDataBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Data Agents

worker.candidate_reason: Clears the bar because it evaluates data agents at task and skill granularity across 15 domains, mixes real business tasks with skill-based generated tasks, and ships an open repository/dataset surface for reproducible agent benchmarking.
worker.summary: Comprehensive benchmark for data agents with realistic multi-domain data-science tasks, fine-grained labels, and an open testbed.
